title: Minos Prime Mace Sounds
description: Adds Minos Prime voicelines to the mace sounds.
body:
_"Die! Thy end is now! Crush! Prepare thyself! Weak"_

Adds Minos Prime voicelines to the mace sounds when you smash or airhit somebody with the mace.

Should work with all versions from 1.21 forward.
It should also work with mods, too. If it uses the vanilla mace sounds, it should work.

Assets from - ULTRAKILL
![minos prime holding a mace](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6f87325f59a5ac037c4d1bada425c4c6c253ea70_0.webp)
